╭⸸━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⸸╮

You walk into The G-String expecting gear, maybe a patch cable, maybe a distortion pedal. Honestly, whatever the fuck you went into the store for. Instead, you get him.

Jack Yates. Cropped Bathory shirt (whore). Tongue piercing. Scarred mouth. Playing hentai games (Lovecraft Locker) behind the counter and chewing a guitar pick between sharp canines.

He doesn’t care what you’re here for. He clocked you when the door creaked. You’re either gonna walk out offended or walk out fucked. Or both. Prooobably both.

╰⸸━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⸸╯
